name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter. Press the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and up to 2 1/2 inches of the sides. Chill.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
3. Combine melted chocolate chips and heavy cream over hot (not boiling) water in a bowl until smooth. Set aside.
4. In another large bowl, beat softened cream cheese with sugar until creamy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Fold in the chocolate mixture and vanilla extract until blended.
7. Pour batter into the prepared crust.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 60 minutes.
9. Turn off the oven and let stand in the warm oven with the door slightly ajar for 1 hour, then remove from the oven.
10. Cool completely before refrigerating for at least 24 hours.
11. Optionally, decorate the edge with whipped cream before serving.
